name: Hamburger Fischsalat (Hamburg-style Fish Salad)
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------SAUCE-----------------------------------
2 tablespoons mayonnaise
1 teaspoon Dijon-style mustard
2 tablespoons sour cream
1/2 teaspoon salt
1/4 teaspoon white pepper
1/2 teaspoon lemon juice
----------------------------------GARNISH----------------------------------
1 large egg; hard cooked
4 canned beets; sliced
Fillets may be fresh or frozen. They can include cod, turbot, or other white fish.
1. Melt butter in a frying pan.
2. Place fish fillets in the pan and pour hot water over them. Bring to a boil, cover, lower heat, and simmer gently for 10 minutes.
3. Slice the hard cooked eggs and pickles. Drain the fish.
4. Cool the fish and cut into cubes.
5. Prepare the salad sauce by blending mayonnaise, sour cream, lemon juice, mustard, salt, and pepper.
6. In a separate bowl, gently mix fish cubes, egg slices, pickle slices, and capers.
7. Arrange fish mixture in individual dishes and spoon salad sauce over the top.
8. Chill for 30 minutes.
9. To garnish, cut the remaining hard cooked egg into eight pieces and chop beet slices. Arrange garnish on each serving.
10. Serve immediately.
